text:
(a) The portion of Farm-to-Market Road 518 in Pearland between its intersection with State Highway 35 and Sunset Meadows Drive is designated as the Officer Endy Ekpanya Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Officer Endy Ekpanya Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(56), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.144 — Officer Endy Ekpanya Memorial Highway

(a) The portion of Farm-to-Market Road 518 in Pearland between its intersection with State Highway 35 and Sunset Meadows Drive is designated as the Officer Endy Ekpanya Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Officer Endy Ekpanya Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(56), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 247 (H.B.938), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2017.*

erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.
